The risks that matter, before they reach the headlines.

Attacked.ai monitors the world's attacks, breaches and disclosures across the GUARD™ control framework. Don't subscribe to a newsletter — assemble an intelligence service tuned to your role, your sectors and the risks you own.

01Start with your role

Pick the hat you wear and we'll pre-select a sharp starting edition. Everything stays editable below — this just saves you the cold start.

Prefer to start clean?

02Flagship briefings

The dependable core. If you read nothing else, read these.

03Recurring briefings

Analysis, trend work, disclosure forensics, vendor movements and the quarterly FDRI™ digest.

04Risk category alerts

Know the moment a material incident lands in a category you own. Each alert is mapped to the GUARD™ framework — you get the event and the controls that govern it.

05Attack-O-Grams™

One major attack, fully deconstructed — the kill chain, the business impact, and the exact GUARD™ controls that would have changed the outcome. Made legible at a glance.

06Sector intelligence

Tune everything to the industries you operate in. Sector feeds draw on our FDRI coverage of 40 industries, 50 companies each. Open a family or bulk-select it.

07Regions

Bias your intelligence toward the regions that matter. Leave blank for global coverage.

08Crisis simulations

Wargaming.ai — crisis decision simulation, powered by Attacked.ai. Pressure-test your organisation against the scenarios most likely to define your next board meeting.

09Playbooks

Build your capability one email at a time. Each playbook is a self-paced course delivered to your inbox.

10From Attacked.ai

Occasional emails from Attacked.ai

Account notifications, product updates, and invitations to briefings, demos and events. Unsubscribe anytime. See our privacy policy.
